policy_statement: A2: Create new public-purpose green areas (parks, gardens, promenades) and improve quality; increase per-capita green area supply to 7 m²/person by 2030 and 9 m²/person by 2050.
parent_statement: Aá-1 objective: Develop Budapest’s green-blue infrastructure to support adaptation (and co-benefits for mitigation).
verbatim_text:
## Improving the ratio of green area and forest area

A2

...new green areas of public purposes... need to be created...

Base year value: 6m2/person

Target year: 2030 ... 7m2/person

Target year: 2050 ... Target year value: 9m2/person
extraction_rationale: Quantified per-capita green space targets with explicit milestone years.
mechanism_description: It creates new and improved public-purpose green areas to increase per-capita green space, which supports urban heat reduction and stormwater resilience.

policy_statement: A3: Implement small watercourse revitalization programs (blue infrastructure), with a pilot on Rákos creek including an ecotourism corridor project to be implemented until 2024 and a target of 10 km revitalized sections by 2026.
parent_statement: Aá-1 objective: Develop Budapest’s green-blue infrastructure to support adaptation (and co-benefits for mitigation).
verbatim_text:
## Blue infrastructure development (revitalization of small watercourses)

A3

...Rákos creek can be a suitable pilot project...

...the Rákos creek ecotourism corridor project will be implemented until 2024...

Target year value: 10km
extraction_rationale: Specific adaptation infrastructure program with named pilot, timeframe, and a quantified target.
mechanism_description: Implementing small watercourse revitalization (blue infrastructure) improves stormwater management and local cooling, reducing flood impacts and heat stress.

policy_statement: A4: Elaborate a 10-year rolling plan for planting trees in public spaces with annual timetables, technical preparation, and a communication protocol for tree felling/replacement; target managed public-space trees increasing from 107,000 (2020) to 130,000 by 2030.
parent_statement: Aá-1 objective: Develop Budapest’s green-blue infrastructure to support adaptation (and co-benefits for mitigation).
verbatim_text:
## Elaboration of a plan for planting trees in public spaces

A4

It is necessary to elaborate a 10 years' plan for planting trees in public spaces, then to continue rolling planning...

...a communication protocol needs to be elaborated for the felling of trees...

Base year value: 107,000 pcs; ... Target year value: 130,000 pcs;
extraction_rationale: Concrete planning and implementation measure with quantified tree target by 2030.
mechanism_description: Elaborate and roll forward a plan for planting and replacing trees in public spaces to increase urban tree cover, supporting heat mitigation and carbon sequestration.

policy_statement: A5: Initiate amendments to higher-level and municipal legal rules to strengthen tree protection, including expert involvement in felling decisions and options for compensation payments to the Environmental Fund; update Budapest’s Regulation No. 10/2005 and require relevant standards in public procurement.
parent_statement: Aá-1 objective: Develop Budapest’s green-blue infrastructure to support adaptation (and co-benefits for mitigation).
verbatim_text:
## Amendment of legal rules to protect trees

A5

It is necessary to initiate the amendment of higher-level legal rules to ensure the more effective protection of trees...

...it is also allowed to make payment into the Environmental Fund instead of replacing a tree...

The relevant regulation of the Municipality of Budapest (Regulation No. 10/2005. (III. 8.)...) requires some update...

In public procurement projects, the application of the standard 'MSZ 12172'... and 'MSZ 12042'... shall be required.

Timeframe: 2022
extraction_rationale: Explicit legal/regulatory change initiative with a timeframe and named instruments/standards.
mechanism_description: It initiates updates to legal rules and public procurement standards to improve protection of trees and influence felling and replacement/compensation practices, helping preserve urban canopy that supports cooling and carbon storage.

policy_statement: A6: Establish and operate a uniform, up-to-date green space cadastre for Budapest by 2024, expanding the FATÁR system to include district-managed green areas and ensuring methodology, data obligations, access, publicity, and integration.
parent_statement: Aá-1 objective: Develop Budapest’s green-blue infrastructure to support adaptation (and co-benefits for mitigation).
verbatim_text:
## Establishing and operation of a uniform, up-to-date green space cadastre

A6

It is necessary to create an up-to-date green space cadastre encompassing the entire public administrative area of Budapest... It is advisable to further develop the FATÁR application...

Timeframe: 2024
extraction_rationale: Specific institutional/data-system measure with deadline year and clear deliverable.
mechanism_description: Create and maintain an up-to-date green space cadastre to improve access to standardized data that supports planning and management decisions for urban green areas and climate adaptation.

policy_statement: A7: Promote revitalization of brownfield areas by updating and publishing a brownfield cadastre and modifying urban planning instruments to prioritize green-area use and redirect development to brownfields rather than designating new buildable greenfield areas; support temporary greening on municipally managed properties.
parent_statement: Aá-1 objective: Develop Budapest’s green-blue infrastructure to support adaptation (and co-benefits for mitigation).
verbatim_text:
## Promotion of the revitalisation of brown-field areas

A7

By the regular updating and publishing of the cadastre of brown-field areas...

...urban planning instruments should be modified... giving priority to the use of land as green areas...

...developments should be diverted to brown-field areas instead of making greenfield investments... it is advisable not to designate any new areas to be built up in the Settlement Structure Plan...
extraction_rationale: Concrete planning/instrument commitments (cadastre updates; planning instrument modifications) aimed at brownfield-first development and greening.
mechanism_description: It updates and publishes a brownfield inventory and modifies planning tools to redirect development from greenfield sites to brownfields and prioritize green-area land use, helping avoid new land conversion and preserve ecosystems and carbon stocks.

policy_statement: Aá-2 objective: Mitigate the urban heat island effect in the built environment.
verbatim_text: Objective Aá -2         Mitigation of the heat island effect in the built environment
extraction_rationale: Umbrella adaptation objective with sub-measures A8 and A9 described in the Adaptation Action Plan.
mechanism_description: The policy objective focuses on reducing the urban heat island effect in the built environment to lower ambient temperatures and heat exposure.

policy_statement: A8: Protect ventilation corridors through Budapest’s Settlement Structure Plan and Rules of Urban Planning by not supporting new buildable area designation or increased building heights in these corridors; compile a manual of good district examples to support climate-protection-related planning instrument review (continuous 2021–2030).
parent_statement: Aá-2 objective: Mitigate the urban heat island effect in the built environment.
verbatim_text:
## Protection of ventilation corridors, ensuring sufficient airspace ratio in streets

A8

...provide for the ventilation corridors... In these areas, the designation of new areas to be built up or the raising of the permitted building height may not be supported...

The goal is to compile a manual...

Timeframe: continuous (2021-2030)
extraction_rationale: Explicit regulatory/planning commitment plus a concrete deliverable (manual) with stated continuous timeframe.
mechanism_description: It protects ventilation corridors by not supporting added buildable areas or taller buildings in those corridors, helping maintain urban airflow that reduces heat and stagnant-air impacts.

policy_statement: A9: Prioritize climate protection in municipal public procurement and support schemes by promoting climate-friendly construction materials and technologies (e.g., permeable/high-albedo pavements, green roofs/façades) and consider adopting an environmental building rating scheme for municipal investments.
parent_statement: Aá-2 objective: Mitigate the urban heat island effect in the built environment.
verbatim_text:
## Promotion of climate friendly construction materials and technologies

A9

Climate protection has to be a priority criterion in the public procurement processes and the tender-based support schemes of the Municipality of Budapest...

Instead of traditional asphalt, 'cooler' and, if possible, permeable surfaces of higher albedo should be applied.

...it is advisable to introduce one of the environmentally friendly building rating schemes or an own scheme.
extraction_rationale: Concrete procurement/support policy direction specifying technologies and instruments (procurement criteria, rating schemes).
mechanism_description: The municipality makes climate protection a priority in procurement and support schemes and promotes climate-friendly materials and designs (e.g., higher-albedo/permeable pavements, green roofs/façades and building rating schemes) to shift construction toward lower-emission and more climate-resilient outcomes.

policy_statement: Aá-3 objective: Develop the flood control system.
verbatim_text: Objective Aá -3         Development of the flood control system
extraction_rationale: Umbrella objective with sub-measure A10 in the Adaptation Action Plan.
mechanism_description: Developing flood control infrastructure reduces flood risk and associated damages during extreme rainfall or flooding events.

policy_statement: A10: Develop and further construct flood control structures to increase the length of flood protection line meeting DFE + 1.3m safety level from 33.73 km (2019) to 69 km by 2030.
parent_statement: Aá-3 objective: Develop the flood control system.
verbatim_text:
## Construction and development of flood control structures

A10

...the flood protection line needs to be developed urgently...

Indicator... Base year value: 33.73 km

Target year: 2030 ... Target year value: 69 km
extraction_rationale: Specific infrastructure development measure with quantified indicator and 2030 target.
mechanism_description: Developing and constructing flood control structures increases the length of flood protection lines that meet the stated safety level, reducing flood risk and associated damages.

policy_statement: Aá-4 objective: Implement adaptive rainwater management.
verbatim_text: Objective Aá -4         Adaptive rainwater management
extraction_rationale: Umbrella objective with sub-measures A11 and A12 in the Adaptation Action Plan.
mechanism_description: Implementing adaptive rainwater management reduces stormwater runoff impacts and helps lower flooding risk during heavy rain events.

policy_statement: A11: Develop a hybrid rainwater drainage management system for Budapest via review of sewage plans, inventory and modelling of drainage structures, identification of critical points, and creation of a mid- and long-term rainwater drainage concept; establish smart digital monitoring and control elements (continuous).
parent_statement: Aá-4 objective: Implement adaptive rainwater management.
verbatim_text:
## Surface runoff regulation and the system required for its safety

A11

In the case of Budapest, we could aim at the creation of a hybrid system...

...necessary to review general sewage plans... lay the foundations for modelling the universal rainwater drainage...

The complete midand long-term rainwater drainage concept for Budapest is to be created...

A smart, digital system needs to be established...
extraction_rationale: Concrete system-planning and infrastructure/ICT measure describing specific actions (review, modelling, concept, smart system).
mechanism_description: It aims to create a hybrid rainwater drainage concept and establish a smart digital monitoring and control system to better manage surface runoff and improve drainage safety, reducing flood and overflow risks.

policy_statement: A12: Support on-site rainwater retention and utilization (and greywater use) through integrating such systems into public investments and creating regulatory instruments and support schemes for private investments; require/encourage delayed runoff, retention or reuse for major emitters (e.g., industry, malls, office blocks) (continuous).
parent_statement: Aá-4 objective: Implement adaptive rainwater management.
verbatim_text:
## Supporting the utilization and retention of rainwater

A12

...for private investments, the appropriate regulatory instruments... and the related support system should be elaborated...

In the case of major emitters (industry, shopping malls, office blocks), users should be made interested in applying or compelled to apply the delayed runoff, retention or secondary use of rainwater.
extraction_rationale: Policy includes regulatory/support mechanisms and explicitly notes compulsion/requirements for major emitters.
mechanism_description: It develops regulatory instruments and support schemes to integrate on-site rainwater retention, delayed runoff, and reuse (including greywater use), reducing stormwater runoff and improving water resilience.

policy_statement: Aá-5 objective: Prepare for extreme weather conditions and health impacts of climate change.
verbatim_text: Objective Aá -5         Preparation for extreme weather conditions and the health impacts of climate change
extraction_rationale: Umbrella objective with measures A13–A16.
mechanism_description: Preparing for extreme weather conditions supports planning and readiness that reduce climate-related health risks and strengthen overall adaptive capacity.

policy_statement: A13: Adapt the transport system to extreme weather by incorporating climate considerations into design standards, materials and procurement; consider permeable pavements, tree planting/grassing of tracks, and develop emergency scenarios for service disruptions (continuous).
parent_statement: Aá-5 objective: Prepare for extreme weather conditions and health impacts of climate change.
verbatim_text:
## Preparation of the transport system for extreme weather phenomena

A13

Transport systems and public utility networks should be designed with consideration to the prognostications...

The aspects described above need to be enforced in the planning process, in public procurement process...

It is recommended to elaborate an emergency scenario for the resolution of operating disruptions caused by extreme weather conditions...
extraction_rationale: Specific adaptation actions affecting infrastructure design/procurement and emergency preparedness.
mechanism_description: It incorporates climate considerations into transport design and procurement and elaborates emergency scenarios to reduce extreme-weather-related infrastructure damage and service disruptions.

policy_statement: A14: Ensure hazard control and emergency planning accounts for climate-change-related extreme events (drought, flood, flash flood, critical infrastructure damage) and review citizen information publications accordingly (continuous).
parent_statement: Aá-5 objective: Prepare for extreme weather conditions and health impacts of climate change.
verbatim_text:
## Managing hazards caused by extreme weather phenomena

A14

It is necessary to examine and ensure that emergency plans manage extreme events which may occur due to climate change (drought, flood, flash flood, damage to critical infrastructure, etc.), and to review the publication prepared to inform the citizens.

Timeframe: continuous
extraction_rationale: Explicit commitment to update emergency plans and public guidance for climate-related hazards.
mechanism_description: The policy examines and updates emergency plans and citizen information materials to better prepare for climate-change-related extreme events and reduce impacts through improved preparedness and response.

policy_statement: A15: Examine climate vulnerability of drinking water bases and supply and implement climate-adaptive development/operation, including capacity enhancements and reconstruction of water production wells; Budapest Waterworks has started development of 60 water production wells (timeframe 2022).
parent_statement: Aá-5 objective: Prepare for extreme weather conditions and health impacts of climate change.
verbatim_text:
## Examination of the climate vulnerability of water bases and drinking water supply and their climate-adaptive development and operation

A15

...there is a justified demand for elaborating operational changes for periods hit by extreme drought...

Budapest Waterworks has started the development of 60 water production wells as part of a project.

Timeframe: 2022
extraction_rationale: Concrete adaptation measure for water supply with specified actions and timeline.
mechanism_description: It examines climate vulnerability of water bases and drinking water supply and carries out climate-adaptive operation and development, including expanding and reconstructing water production wells to improve resilience during drought conditions.

policy_statement: A16: Incorporate preparation for windstorms and flood/flash flood/inundation risks into preservation and renovation of municipal buildings, including attention to sizing of structures, basements, windows, sun shades, and waterproofing (by 2030).
parent_statement: Aá-5 objective: Prepare for extreme weather conditions and health impacts of climate change.
verbatim_text:
## Preparation for extreme weather conditions during the preservation and renovation of buildings

A16

...the Municipality has to pay priority attention concerning its own building stock to the proper sizing of support structures, basements, windows, sun shades and waterproofing sheets.

Timeframe: 2030
extraction_rationale: Defined adaptation action for municipal building asset management with a target year.
mechanism_description: The municipality pays priority attention to windstorm and flood preparedness features during preservation and renovation of its buildings to reduce damage and impacts from extreme weather.

policy_statement: Aá-6 objective: Mitigate vulnerability of natural and landscape values.
verbatim_text: Objective Aá -6         Mitigation of the vulnerability of natural and landscape values
extraction_rationale: Umbrella objective with measures A17–A19.
mechanism_description: This objective focuses on reducing the vulnerability of natural and landscape values by strengthening planning and management capacity to support climate adaptation for ecosystems.

policy_statement: A17: Prepare a detailed climate change risk and vulnerability assessment for natural values by 2023, to support nature conservation and invasive species control.
parent_statement: Aá-6 objective: Mitigate vulnerability of natural and landscape values.
verbatim_text:
## Preparation of the detailed climate change risk and vulnerability assessment for natural values

A17

...requires... the assessment and monitoring of risks and vulnerabilities.

Timeframe: 2023
extraction_rationale: Specific assessment deliverable with timeline, supporting adaptation/nature management.
mechanism_description: It requires assessing and monitoring climate risks and vulnerabilities for natural values so the results can support nature conservation and invasive species control planning.

policy_statement: A18: Expand protected natural sites of local importance, examining extensions continuously, targeting growth from 861 ha (2019) to 1,200 ha by 2026 (and referencing further planned additions).
parent_statement: Aá-6 objective: Mitigate vulnerability of natural and landscape values.
verbatim_text:
## Continuing the expansion and extension of protected natural sites of local importance

A18

...new areas are declared to be protected sites on an estimated area of 800 ha...

Base year value: 861 ha

Target year: 2026 ... Target year value: 1200 ha
extraction_rationale: Land protection expansion measure with quantified baseline and target area.
mechanism_description: Continuing the expansion of protected natural sites by declaring new areas as protected helps preserve ecosystems and maintain stored carbon by reducing land conversion and degradation.

policy_statement: A19: Implement environmental/nature conservation management including confinement of invasive plant and animal species in protected natural sites, supported by continuous monitoring and data collection; target is to reduce the highest coverage ratio of invasive plant species by 2030.
parent_statement: Aá-6 objective: Mitigate vulnerability of natural and landscape values.
verbatim_text:
## Environmental protection management, confinement of invasive plant and animal species

A19

One of the most important tasks of this management is to confine invasive species...

Indicator... Base year value: 18%

Target year: 2030 ... Target year value: it should be reduced
extraction_rationale: Ongoing management measure with an explicit performance indicator direction and target year.
mechanism_description: The plan implements conservation management to confine invasive plant and animal species in protected natural sites, supported by continuous monitoring and data collection, to protect ecosystem health and resilience.

policy_statement: SZ-1 objective: Implement climate-conscious city management, with cooperative leadership by the Municipality taking the lead in climate protection.
verbatim_text: Objective SZ-1          Climate conscious city management: cooperative city management taking the lead in climate protection
extraction_rationale: Named umbrella awareness/city management objective with measures SZ1–SZ4 described subsequently.
mechanism_description: The municipality takes the lead in climate protection through cooperative, climate-conscious city management to support an overall emissions reduction pathway.

policy_statement: SZ1: Promote climate-conscious operation within the Mayor’s Office and its companies through supported initiatives and training, targeting 1,500 persons participating in training by 2030.
parent_statement: SZ-1 objective: Implement climate-conscious city management, with cooperative leadership by the Municipality taking the lead in climate protection.
verbatim_text:
## Climate conscious workplace, climate conscious colleagues

SZ1

The goal of the measure is to support and encourage initiatives promoting the climateconscious operation of the Mayor's Office and its companies and to introduce climate protection measures.

Target year value: 1,500 persons
extraction_rationale: Specific organizational measure with quantified participation target and timeframe.
mechanism_description: The city supports initiatives and training to encourage climate-conscious operations in the Mayor’s Office and its companies, helping introduce climate protection measures that reduce operational emissions.

policy_statement: SZ2: Integrate horizontal climate protection principles into urban development and sectoral strategies, climate due diligence for major investments, and into decrees and tender criteria; ongoing continuous implementation.
parent_statement: SZ-1 objective: Implement climate-conscious city management, with cooperative leadership by the Municipality taking the lead in climate protection.
verbatim_text:
## Enforcement of horizontal climate protection principles...

SZ2

This measure is intended to integrate climate protection measures and/or horizontal climate protection principles during the preparation and review of urban development and thematic sectoral strategies...

It is also necessary to enforce climate protection principles... when the criteria for the tenders announced by the capital city are determined.

Timeframe: continuous
extraction_rationale: Cross-cutting governance commitment describing specific integration points (strategies, investments, decrees, tenders).
mechanism_description: It enforces integrating climate protection principles into strategies, major investment due diligence, and tender criteria so that public planning and purchasing decisions shift toward lower-emission choices over time.

policy_statement: SZ3: Operate the Budapest Climate Change Platform and an online platform to share best practices and build partnerships, targeting 20 sessions and 30,000 visitors by 2030.
parent_statement: SZ-1 objective: Implement climate-conscious city management, with cooperative leadership by the Municipality taking the lead in climate protection.
verbatim_text:
## Operation of the Budapest Climate Change Program and a dedicated online platform...

SZ3

...The platform facilitates... sharing of best practices... comprehensive follow-up... and the creation of a database...

Target year: 2030 ... Target year value: 20 sessions, 30,000 visitors
extraction_rationale: Specific institutional platform measure with quantified output indicators and target year.
mechanism_description: The city operates a climate platform and online portal to share best practices, track follow-up, and build partnerships, strengthening institutional capacity to support climate action.

policy_statement: SZ4: Establish cooperation with the corporate sector to support Budapest’s climate objectives, including involving companies in financing/implementing mitigation, adaptation and awareness measures and organizing climate-friendly alliances, voluntary commitments, awards and competitions (continuous to 2030).
parent_statement: SZ-1 objective: Implement climate-conscious city management, with cooperative leadership by the Municipality taking the lead in climate protection.
verbatim_text:
## Establishing cooperation with the corporate sector...

SZ4

The purpose of the measure is to establish cooperation between the Municipality of Budapest and companies and to involve companies in the implementation and financing of the mitigation, adaptation and awareness-raising measure of Budapest...

The Municipality of Budapest also wishes to promote climate-conscious city management by organising and coordinating climate-friendly alliances with companies, voluntary commitments, awards and competitions.
extraction_rationale: Defined cooperation/engagement measure with clear mechanisms (alliances, commitments, awards) and implementation intent.
mechanism_description: The city plans to cooperate with companies through climate-friendly alliances, voluntary commitments, awards, and competitions to involve them in financing and implementing mitigation, adaptation, and awareness-raising measures.

section_header: 4.1.   REDUCTION OF THE EMISSION OF GREENHOUSE GASES (MITIGATION)
policy_statement: Budapest has set a target to reduce its greenhouse gas emissions by at least 40% by 2030 compared to the 2015 base year.
verbatim_text:
Accordingly, the Municipality of Budapest has set the target to reduce its emissions by 40% by 2030 compared to the base year of 2015.

Chart 2: The decarbonisation target of Budapest

2015: 6.11 million t CO2; 2030: -40%
extraction_rationale: Quantified mitigation target with deadline and stated baseline year.
mechanism_description: The Municipality of Budapest has set a target to reduce citywide greenhouse gas emissions, guiding an overall emissions reduction pathway across sectors.

section_header: 4.1.   REDUCTION OF THE EMISSION OF GREENHOUSE GASES (MITIGATION)
policy_statement: By joining the Under 2 Coalition, Budapest committed to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by at least 80% by 2050 compared to 1990 levels and/or reduce annual per-capita emissions below 2 metric tons.
verbatim_text: By joining the Coalition, the parties undertake to reduce their emission of greenhouse gases by 80% as a minimum by 2050 compared to the values in 1990 and/or reduce their annual per capita emission below 2 metric tons.
extraction_rationale: Long-term quantified commitment (percentage reduction and/or per-capita threshold) with a deadline year.
mechanism_description: The city undertakes to reduce economy-wide and per-capita greenhouse gas emissions, creating an overall pathway toward lower emissions.

section_header: SZ-2 Climate conscious citizens: strengthening the environmental awareness and responsibility among the population and economic actors
policy_statement: Carry out thematic awareness-raising campaigns and informational activities via the Mayor’s Office and Budapest business organisations, focusing on reducing household energy consumption, with annual financing of HUF 100 million and 2030 energy/CO2 targets.
verbatim_text:
Thematic  awareness-raising  campaigns  and  informational  activities  through  the Mayor's  Office  and  the business  organisations  of  Budapest,  with  special  regard  to reducing the volume of household energy consumption

| Necessary financing | HUF 100 million per annum |
| ... |
| Target year: 2030 | Target year value: 432,496 MWh; 85,744 tCO 2 /annum |
extraction_rationale: This is a defined municipal measure (SZ5) with specified activities plus committed annual financing and quantified 2030 mitigation targets (MWh saved and tCO2/yr).
mechanism_description: The city plans awareness-raising campaigns and informational activities to encourage households to reduce energy consumption, lowering associated CO2 emissions.

section_header: Developing the adaptation knowledge and ability of the population, particularly in respect of heat waves, rainwater management, property protection and green infrastructure
policy_statement: Develop the adaptation knowledge and ability of the population (heat waves, rainwater management, property protection, green infrastructure) through ongoing information/awareness actions, targeting 100,000 people reached by 2030.
verbatim_text:
## Developing  the  adaptation  knowledge  and  ability  of  the  population,  particularly  in respect of heat waves, rainwater management, property protection and green infrastructure

| Indicator | Number of persons reached actively and passively |
| Base year: 2020 | Base year value: n.a. |
| Target year: 2030 | Target year value: 100 000 |
extraction_rationale: Concrete adaptation measure (SZ6) with an explicit quantified target (people reached by 2030) and described intervention focus areas.

extraction_rationale: Time-bound infrastructure completion commitment.
mechanism_description: Completing the inner-city bicycle network supports more trips by bike instead of car, reducing transport emissions.

policy_statement: Complete the Baana network for bicycle traffic by 2030.
parent_statement: Using sustainable means of transport (key actions related to modes of transport).

extraction_rationale: Time-bound infrastructure completion commitment.
mechanism_description: The city will complete the bicycle traffic network to support more cycling and reduce transport-related greenhouse gas emissions.
